title: astragalus monspessulanus
intro: Astragalus monspessulanus, also known as goat's-thorn or milk-vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress and promote overall well-being. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus monspessulanus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote health and longevity.
